name: Westwood Mortgage, Inc.
description_short: Westwood Mortgage Team, now operating as Cornerstone First Mortgage, is a mortgage lender based in the Northgate location with over 35 years of service offering competitive home loan programs.
description_long:
Westwood Mortgage, Inc. has been serving homebuyers since 1989 from its Northgate location. In a recent transition, the company rebranded as part of Cornerstone First Mortgage, LLC, while maintaining its original team, expertise, and commitment to customer service in the same physical location. The company emphasizes continuity and local relationships despite the organizational change.

The company offers an extensive range of home loan programs designed to serve different borrower needs and financial situations. Their website references competitive rates and FHA loan services (including case transfers), indicating they work with both conventional and government-backed mortgage products. Borrowers can apply online or work directly with one of four named loan officers who are NMLS-licensed and available for consultation.

What distinguishes Westwood Mortgage is its emphasis on longevity and local presence—operating from the same Northgate location for over three decades with an experienced team. The company encourages prospective customers to review their ratings on Google, Yelp, and Angie's List, suggesting a reputation-focused approach. Each loan officer is individually licensed and contactable, enabling personalized service rather than a purely digital experience.

A practical limitation is that the website provides minimal specific details about loan types, rates, terms, or eligibility criteria. The company appears to be primarily a regional or local lender tied to its Washington location, which may limit accessibility for borrowers outside that area. Prospective applicants will need to contact the team directly or use their online application to understand specific offerings and get rate quotes.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: 35+ years of operating history from the same Northgate location, demonstrating stability and local market knowledge
Team of four NMLS-licensed loan officers available for direct personal consultation and guidance
Offers FHA loans in addition to conventional mortgages, serving a broader range of borrower profiles
Online application option for convenience, plus phone and in-person consultation available
Encourages verification through third-party review platforms (Google, Yelp, Angie's List)
Equal Opportunity Lender designation and transparent NMLS licensing (ID #173855)
Dedicated FHA case transfer email support for streamlined administrative processes
cons: Website provides no specific information about interest rates, loan terms, or APR ranges for comparison
Limited geographic footprint suggests the company may primarily serve Washington-area borrowers, reducing accessibility
No details about specific loan products (purchase, refinance, jumbo, VA, reverse mortgage eligibility criteria)
Minimal information about processing times, approval rates, or customer service standards
Website lacks information about down payment requirements, credit score minimums, or qualification benchmarks
best_for: Home buyers in the Washington/Seattle metro area seeking personalized service from an established local lender
FHA loan applicants who benefit from the company's FHA expertise and case transfer capabilities
Borrowers who prefer direct phone and in-person consultation with a named loan officer rather than digital-only service
Repeat customers or referrals familiar with the Westwood Mortgage brand seeking continuity after the Cornerstone rebrand
diagnosis: Westwood Mortgage Team is best suited for Washington-area borrowers seeking a personal relationship with an experienced local lender that has served the community for 35+ years. The main caveat is that the website provides minimal pricing, product, or qualification transparency—interested applicants must contact the team directly or apply online to receive specific rate quotes and determine eligibility.
services: Mortgage origination and application processing (online and in-person)
FHA mortgage loans and FHA case transfer assistance
One-on-one loan officer consultation and guidance
Loan officer assignment by customer preference
In-person branch consultation at Northgate location
Home loan program matching to borrower financial needs
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
